description_long: This is a fabric grocery bag with a rounded, bucket-like shape and two loop handles for carrying. The exterior features a striking color-block design, with one half in a deep denim blue and the other in a mustard yellow adorned with abstract, tribal-inspired patterns in black and white. The handles are made from the same patterned yellow fabric, seamlessly attached to the rim of the bag. The bag appears soft and flexible, with visible stitching along the seams and a slightly structured base to help it stand upright. The interior is a solid dark blue, matching the blue exterior panel, and the bag is currently empty, showing no bulging or deformation. The overall appearance is stylish and practical, suitable for urban shopping or casual outings.
description: A stylish, fabric grocery bag with blue and patterned yellow panels, featuring two loop handles and a soft, rounded shape. The bag is empty and displays a modern, urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue and yellow patterned panels, both handles, and the open, empty interior.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the yellow patterned panel and both handles aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the blue panel with a visible seam and the yellow patterned side, both handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing mostly the blue panel with a small section of yellow at the rim, handles aligned vertically.
attribute_branding_or_logo: abstract patterned design, no visible branding or logo
